news.title:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance to hold board meeting on 25th March 2026 to approve borrowing budget for FY 2026-27.
Borrowing via loans, debentures, bonds, commercial papers, deposits, foreign currency bonds, and NHB refinance considered.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance to hold board meeting on 25th March 2026 to approve borrowing budget for FY 2026-27.
Borrowing via loans, debentures, bonds, commercial papers, deposits, foreign currency bonds, and NHB refinance considered.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance Q3 net profit at 13.98B, slightly below 14B YoY, but beats 13.6B estimates.
Q3 revenue rises to 70.5B from 69.5B YoY, reflecting growth in operations.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance Q3 net profit at 13.98B, slightly below 14B YoY, but beats 13.6B estimates.

news.title:
AMFI's reclassification may upgrade Muthoot Finance, HDFC AMC, and Canara Bank to largecap. Stocks like REC, Bajaj Housing may be downgraded to midcap.
Smallcap stocks like Endurance Tech and Poonawalla Fincorp could move to midcap, while some midcaps like Sona BLW and LIC Housing may shift to smallcap.
news.summary:
AMFI's reclassification may upgrade Muthoot Finance, HDFC AMC, and Canara Bank to largecap. Stocks like REC, Bajaj Housing may be downgraded to midcap.
Smallcap stocks like Endurance Tech and Poonawalla Fincorp could move to midcap, while some midcaps like Sona BLW and LIC Housing may shift to smallcap.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance focuses on NIM recovery amid tight competition, aiming for 2.6-2.8 range in FY26.
AUM grew 0.7% QoQ to Rs 3.1 trillion; Elara Capital revises target price to Rs 677, retains 'Accumulate' rating.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance focuses on NIM recovery amid tight competition, aiming for 2.6-2.8 range in FY26.
AUM grew 0.7% QoQ to Rs 3.1 trillion; Elara Capital revises target price to Rs 677, retains 'Accumulate' rating.
